content: Module cell created at brain bootstrap. Source state verified: all files compiled clean 2026-02-28. Tag-based stubs confirmed in tasks/conditions/evaluator. ACT-001 written for Step 2 work.

Worker roster added to AForeman_AIController. RegisterWorker + UnregisterWorker (BlueprintCallable), GetRegisteredWorkers (C++ only ŌĆö TWeakObjectPtr not UHT-Blueprint-compatible), TArray<TWeakObjectPtr<AActor>> RegisteredWorkers (VisibleAnywhere, no BlueprintReadOnly). RemoveAll in UnregisterWorker also purges stale entries. No UHT errors. No editor restart needed (Live Coding). Next: Step 2b ŌĆö GetOwnCondition() returning UAndroidConditionComponent*.

Steps 2f+2g complete. ForemanStateTreeTasks.cpp + .h refactored. PlanJob: tag-based GetAllActorsWithTag replaced with SmartObjectSubsystem query (FSmartObjectRequest, 5000-unit radius, closest Free slot) + roster-based idle worker selection via IWytchCommandable::Execute_GetWorkerState. AssignWorker: tag-based claim/remove replaced with IWytchCommandable::Execute_ReceiveSmartObjectAssignment (invalid ClaimHandle Ś DEC-004 worker-claims-on-arrival). Header: FSmartObjectRequestResult SelectedSlotResult added to FForemanTask_PlanJobInstanceData. AssignWorker FInstanceDataType changed to FForemanTask_PlanJobInstanceData. New includes: IWytchCommandable.h, SmartObjectSubsystem.h, SmartObjectRuntime.h, SmartObjectRequestTypes.h. DE-004 fully retired. No compile errors. Backup pending. Step 3 next Ś workers implement IWytchCommandable, BP_AutoBot first (confirm with Ricky).

AAutoBot_Character C++ class created (AutoBot_Character.h + AutoBot_Character.cpp). Parent: ACharacter. Implements IWytchCommandable: ReceiveSmartObjectAssignment_Implementation, GetWorkerState_Implementation, GetCapabilities_Implementation, AbortCurrentTask_Implementation. Components: AndroidConditionComponent. Navigation flow: MoveToLocation via AIController + arrival timer ? MarkSlotAsClaimed on arrival (DEC-004). BP spec written to handshake.json HND-002 for Aisling_BP. No compile errors in .cpp. Rider shows 4 UFUNCTION hide-non-virtual warnings on .h Ś expected UE BlueprintNativeEvent pattern, not compile errors. Waiting for Aisling_BP to create BP_AutoBot after build.

AutoBot_Character.h/.cpp revised. Added EAutoBot_Class enum (Scout/Light/Heavy). Removed UFUNCTION re-declarations from header (kept only _Implementation overrides Ś cleaner, no Rider hide-warnings). Added RegisterWithForeman() Ś BeginPlay calls GetAllActorsOfClass(AForeman_AIController) and registers self. BeginPlay ordering confirmed correct: Super first (component BeginPlay fires), then AppendTags+RecalculateCapabilities. MarkSlotAsClaimed signature fixed: 3 params (SlotHandle, ESmartObjectClaimPriority::Normal, FConstStructView()). TObjectPtr IsValid fixed to ::IsValid(ptr) free function. PrimaryActorTick.bCanEverTick=false (timer-driven). HND-002 handshake rewritten for 3 BP children: BP_AutoBot_Scout (0.5x scale, 500 speed), BP_AutoBot_Light (1x, 300), BP_AutoBot_Heavy (3x, 175). Mech mesh confirmed at /Game/ControlRig/Characters/Mech/. CR_Mech already written Ś no new anim work needed. All errors resolved.
